page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.16xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by the custom ARM64-based Alibaba YiTian710 processor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores running at 2.75 GHz with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, eliminating hyperthreading overhead. The instance is equipped with 256 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4 GB of memory per core. It operates on a KVM hypervisor and does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the ARM-based architecture demonstrates strong multi-core performance, as evidenced by a stress-ng multi-core score of 114,913.22 and a multi-threaded bzip3 decompression rate of 461.74 GB/sec. Memory subsystem performance is highly competitive, with a top-tier PassMark memory score and cached small-block read bandwidth reaching 6,463.67 GB/sec. However, uncached large-block read and write bandwidths are more moderate, measuring 105.79 GB/sec and 50.98 GB/sec respectively. Single-core performance remains in the average tier, with a stress-ng single-core score of 1,815.19.

The hardware profile delivers notable qualitative cost efficiency for multi-threaded workloads due to its high density of dedicated physical cores and strong memory performance relative to standard x86 architectures. It lacks advanced vector and matrix extensions but supports hardware-accelerated AES cryptography. This makes the instance well-suited for highly parallelized workloads such as database operations, Redis deployments, multi-threaded data decompression, and general-purpose web serving.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.16xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by the ARM64-based Alibaba YiTian710 processor, featuring 64 dedicated physical cores at 2.75 GHz and 256 GB of RAM. Operating on a KVM hypervisor, this instance lacks local storage and GPUs but provides a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. Benchmarks indicate strong multi-core capabilities, highlighted by a stress-ng multi-core score of 114,913.22 and a top-tier PassMark memory score, alongside strong Redis SET performance of 93.0 million operations per second. While single-core performance and uncached memory bandwidth are average, the dedicated core architecture offers high resource density and qualitative cost efficiency for parallel workloads. It is highly suitable for database operations, multi-threaded data processing, and web serving.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.16xlarge is an ARM64-based general-purpose instance featuring 64 dedicated YiTian710 physical cores, 256 GB of RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth, optimized for parallel workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.16xlarge is an ARM64 instance with 64 dedicated YiTian710 cores, 256 GB RAM, and strong multi-core benchmark performance.
tagline: An ARM64-powered dedicated core instance delivering strong multi-threaded performance and high memory bandwidth for parallel enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated ARM64 physical cores running at 2.75 GHz with no hyperthreading overhead
256 GB of RAM providing a balanced 4 GB per core allocation
Strong multi-core performance with 114,913.22 stress-ng score and top-tier memory benchmarks
32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage or GPU accelerators
Optimized for database operations, Redis deployments, and multi-threaded data processing
